questions.stem:
—I _______ the film twice. It's really interesting.
—Really? When did you see it last time?
questions.explanation: 本题考查现在完成时与一般过去时的区别。现在完成时（have seen）表示过去发生的动作对现在造成的影响或结果（已经看过两次，了解内容），而一般过去时（saw）只表示过去某个具体时间发生的动作。答句询问"上次什么时候看的"，暗示问句强调"到目前为止看过两次"这个经历，应用现在完成时。选项C是一般现在时，D是现在进行时，均不符合语境。解题技巧：看到"twice/ever/never/so far"等标志词，或强调对现在的影响时，用现在完成时；看到"yesterday/last week/just now"等具体时间状语时，用一般过去时。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: This is the book _______ I bought yesterday. It is about environmental protection.
questions.explanation: 本题考查定语从句关系代词的选择。先行词是"the book"（物），在从句中作宾语，应使用which或that。who/whom用于指人，whose表示"...的"（所有格）。此处指物，故选B。选项A指人（主格），C指人（宾格），D表示所属关系，均不符合。解题技巧：定语从句选择关系词时，先看先行词是人还是物，再看在从句中充当什么成分（主语、宾语、定语）。物用which/that，人用who/whom/that，所有格用whose。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: The new bridge _______ by the workers last year. It is very convenient for us to cross the river now.
questions.explanation: 本题考查一般过去时的被动语态。主语"The new bridge"是动作"build"的承受者，需用被动语态（be+done）。时间状语"last year"表明是一般过去时，因此用was/were+过去分词。主语是单数，故选A（was built）。选项B是主动语态过去式，C是一般现在时被动，D是主动语态第三人称单数，均错误。解题技巧：被动语态基本结构为"be+过去分词"，判断时态看时间状语，判断单复数看主语。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: You _______ be tired after working for 12 hours without a rest. Go to bed early tonight.
questions.explanation: 本题考查情态动词表推测的用法。根据语境"工作12小时没休息"，可以非常肯定地推测"你一定很累"。must表示肯定推测（一定是），can't表示否定推测（不可能是），might表示不确定推测（可能是），need表示需要（不表推测）。此处是肯定且有依据的推测，故选A。解题技巧：肯定推测用must（一定），否定推测用can't（不可能），不确定用might/may/could（可能）。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: Please _______ the lights when you leave the classroom to save electricity.
questions.explanation: 本题考查动词短语辨析。turn on打开（电器），turn off关闭（电器），turn up调大（音量），turn down调小（音量）。根据语境"离开教室"和"节约用电"，应该"关灯"，故选B。解题技巧：记住turn短语的常见含义，结合生活常识（离开要关灯省电）进行判断。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: The news sounds _______. I can't believe it is true.
questions.explanation: 本题考查词性转换及前缀用法。根据后句"无法相信是真的"，可知消息"难以置信"。un-是否定前缀，unbelievable意为"难以置信的"。选项A（可信的）与句意相反，C（被相信的，过去分词）和D（令人相信的，现在分词）是动词分词形式，不能作系动词sound的表语。解题技巧：后缀-able构成形容词，前缀un-表示否定；系动词sound/look/feel后接形容词。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: As students, we should _______ our best to protect the environment in our daily life.
questions.explanation: 本题考查固定搭配。try one's best to do sth. 是固定短语，意为"尽某人最大努力做某事"。do/make/take不与best构成此搭配。故选A。解题技巧：记住常见固定搭配：try one's best（尽某人最大努力），do one's homework（做作业），make friends（交朋友），take action（采取行动）。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.group_passage:
Many students think protecting the environment is only the government's job. However, we can also do something to help at school. Last month, our school started a "Green Campus" project.

The project encourages students to reduce waste. For example, we should use both sides of paper when doing homework. Also, we bring our own water bottles instead of buying plastic ones.

I have joined the school's recycling club. Every Friday afternoon, we collect waste paper and bottles from each classroom. At first, some students didn't understand why we were doing this. But after we explained the importance of recycling, they began to support us.

So far, we have collected over 500 kilos of waste paper. The money from selling it will be used to buy books for children in poor areas.

Through this project, I have learned that small actions can make a big difference. Protecting the environment starts with small steps in our daily life.
questions.explanation: 本题考查介词固定搭配。at school是固定搭配，意为"在学校"。in school强调在校学习的状态，at school强调地点。此处指"在学校"这个地点，故选B。选项C（on）和D（to）不与school构成此搭配。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Many students think protecting the environment is only the government's job. However, we can also do something to help at school. Last month, our school started a "Green Campus" project.

The project encourages students to reduce waste. For example, we should use both sides of paper when doing homework. Also, we bring our own water bottles instead of buying plastic ones.

I have joined the school's recycling club. Every Friday afternoon, we collect waste paper and bottles from each classroom. At first, some students didn't understand why we were doing this. But after we explained the importance of recycling, they began to support us.

So far, we have collected over 500 kilos of waste paper. The money from selling it will be used to buy books for children in poor areas.

Through this project, I have learned that small actions can make a big difference. Protecting the environment starts with small steps in our daily life.
questions.explanation: 本题考查语境推理。根据下文"use both sides of paper"（双面用纸）和"bring our own water bottles"（自带水杯）可知，这些都是"减少"废弃物的例子。reduce减少，reuse重复使用，recycle回收，increase增加。根据语境，项目鼓励学生"减少"浪费，故选A。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Many students think protecting the environment is only the government's job. However, we can also do something to help at school. Last month, our school started a "Green Campus" project.

The project encourages students to reduce waste. For example, we should use both sides of paper when doing homework. Also, we bring our own water bottles instead of buying plastic ones.

I have joined the school's recycling club. Every Friday afternoon, we collect waste paper and bottles from each classroom. At first, some students didn't understand why we were doing this. But after we explained the importance of recycling, they began to support us.

So far, we have collected over 500 kilos of waste paper. The money from selling it will be used to buy books for children in poor areas.

Through this project, I have learned that small actions can make a big difference. Protecting the environment starts with small steps in our daily life.
questions.explanation: 本题考查固定搭配。instead of是固定短语，意为"代替，而不是"，后接名词或动名词。此处指"自带水杯而不是买塑料瓶"。because of因为，afraid of害怕，full of充满，均不符合语境。故选A。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Many students think protecting the environment is only the government's job. However, we can also do something to help at school. Last month, our school started a "Green Campus" project.

The project encourages students to reduce waste. For example, we should use both sides of paper when doing homework. Also, we bring our own water bottles instead of buying plastic ones.

I have joined the school's recycling club. Every Friday afternoon, we collect waste paper and bottles from each classroom. At first, some students didn't understand why we were doing this. But after we explained the importance of recycling, they began to support us.

So far, we have collected over 500 kilos of waste paper. The money from selling it will be used to buy books for children in poor areas.

Through this project, I have learned that small actions can make a big difference. Protecting the environment starts with small steps in our daily life.
questions.explanation: 本题考查语境推理。根据下文"But after we explained..."（但当我们解释后）可知，起初有些学生不"理解"我们为什么这么做。understand理解，明白，符合语境。know知道，think认为，agree同意，都不如understand贴切。故选B。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Many students think protecting the environment is only the government's job. However, we can also do something to help at school. Last month, our school started a "Green Campus" project.

The project encourages students to reduce waste. For example, we should use both sides of paper when doing homework. Also, we bring our own water bottles instead of buying plastic ones.

I have joined the school's recycling club. Every Friday afternoon, we collect waste paper and bottles from each classroom. At first, some students didn't understand why we were doing this. But after we explained the importance of recycling, they began to support us.

So far, we have collected over 500 kilos of waste paper. The money from selling it will be used to buy books for children in poor areas.

Through this project, I have learned that small actions can make a big difference. Protecting the environment starts with small steps in our daily life.
questions.explanation: 本题考查被动语态及固定搭配。be used to do sth. 被用来做某事。spend的主语通常是人，结构为spend money on sth.；take通常用于it takes sb. time to do sth.；pay的主语也是人，结构为pay money for sth.。此处主语是money，且表示"被用来买书"，故选A。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Do you often feel sleepy in class? Many students don't get enough sleep because they stay up late playing computer games or doing homework. Scientists say teenagers need about 8 to 10 hours of sleep every night.

Sleep is important for our health. During sleep, our bodies grow and our brains rest. If we don't sleep well, we may have trouble remembering things. Also, lack of sleep can make us feel stressed and unhappy.

To sleep better, we should form good habits. First, don't drink coffee or tea in the evening. Second, stay away from screens at least one hour before bedtime. The blue light from phones and computers makes it hard for us to fall asleep. Finally, try to go to bed at the same time every night, even on weekends.

A good night's sleep helps us stay active during the day. It also improves our memory and helps us do better in exams. So, put down your phone and go to bed early tonight!
questions.stem: How many hours of sleep do teenagers need every night according to the passage?
questions.explanation: 本题是细节理解题。根据文章第一段最后一句"Scientists say teenagers need about 8 to 10 hours of sleep every night."（科学家说青少年每晚需要大约8到10小时的睡眠），可直接找到答案B。解题技巧：细节题通常能在原文中找到原句或同义句，做题时要根据关键词（如teenagers/hours of sleep）快速定位到相关段落。
questions.label: 阅读-细节理解

questions.group_passage:
Do you often feel sleepy in class? Many students don't get enough sleep because they stay up late playing computer games or doing homework. Scientists say teenagers need about 8 to 10 hours of sleep every night.

Sleep is important for our health. During sleep, our bodies grow and our brains rest. If we don't sleep well, we may have trouble remembering things. Also, lack of sleep can make us feel stressed and unhappy.

To sleep better, we should form good habits. First, don't drink coffee or tea in the evening. Second, stay away from screens at least one hour before bedtime. The blue light from phones and computers makes it hard for us to fall asleep. Finally, try to go to bed at the same time every night, even on weekends.

A good night's sleep helps us stay active during the day. It also improves our memory and helps us do better in exams. So, put down your phone and go to bed early tonight!
questions.stem: What can we learn from the passage?
options: A. Sleep is not important for students' study.
B. We should use phones right before sleep.
C. Lack of sleep affects memory and mood.
D. Teenagers need less sleep than adults.
questions.explanation: 本题是推理判断题。根据第二段"If we don't sleep well, we may have trouble remembering things. Also, lack of sleep can make us feel stressed and unhappy."（如果我们睡不好，可能记不住东西。缺乏睡眠也会让我们感到压力大和不开心），可推断出缺乏睡眠会影响记忆力和情绪，故选C。选项A与文章主旨相反，B与第三段"stay away from screens"矛盾，D文章未提及且与科学常识相反。解题技巧：推理题需要根据原文信息进行合理推断，不能选原文明确表述的（那是细节题），也不能选与原文矛盾或未提及的。
questions.label: 阅读-推理判断

questions.group_passage:
Do you often feel sleepy in class? Many students don't get enough sleep because they stay up late playing computer games or doing homework. Scientists say teenagers need about 8 to 10 hours of sleep every night.

Sleep is important for our health. During sleep, our bodies grow and our brains rest. If we don't sleep well, we may have trouble remembering things. Also, lack of sleep can make us feel stressed and unhappy.

To sleep better, we should form good habits. First, don't drink coffee or tea in the evening. Second, stay away from screens at least one hour before bedtime. The blue light from phones and computers makes it hard for us to fall asleep. Finally, try to go to bed at the same time every night, even on weekends.

A good night's sleep helps us stay active during the day. It also improves our memory and helps us do better in exams. So, put down your phone and go to bed early tonight!
questions.stem: What does the phrase "lack of sleep" in Paragraph 2 mean?
questions.explanation: 本题是词义猜测题。根据上下文，第二段讲睡眠的重要性，"lack of sleep"与"feel stressed and unhappy"（感到压力和不开心）相关联。根据构词法，lack意为"缺乏"，且前文提到"don't get enough sleep"（睡眠不足），可推测lack of sleep意为"缺乏睡眠"。故选B。解题技巧：词义猜测可通过上下文逻辑关系（因果、转折）、同义/反义关系、构词法（前缀后缀）或生活常识来判断。
questions.label: 阅读-词义猜测

questions.group_passage:
Do you often feel sleepy in class? Many students don't get enough sleep because they stay up late playing computer games or doing homework. Scientists say teenagers need about 8 to 10 hours of sleep every night.

Sleep is important for our health. During sleep, our bodies grow and our brains rest. If we don't sleep well, we may have trouble remembering things. Also, lack of sleep can make us feel stressed and unhappy.

To sleep better, we should form good habits. First, don't drink coffee or tea in the evening. Second, stay away from screens at least one hour before bedtime. The blue light from phones and computers makes it hard for us to fall asleep. Finally, try to go to bed at the same time every night, even on weekends.

A good night's sleep helps us stay active during the day. It also improves our memory and helps us do better in exams. So, put down your phone and go to bed early tonight!
questions.stem: What is the best title for the passage?
questions.explanation: 本题是主旨大意题。文章第一段讲青少年需要充足睡眠，第二段讲睡眠的重要性（对健康、记忆力的影响），第三段讲如何改善睡眠，第四段总结睡眠的好处。全文围绕"睡眠的重要性"展开，故选B。选项A（如何更好学习）只在最后一句提及，C（睡前的坏习惯）只在第三段提及，D（青少年的日常生活）范围过大，均不能概括全文。解题技巧：主旨题要通读全文，找出高频词和主题句（通常在首段或尾段），选择能覆盖全文内容的标题，避免以偏概全。
questions.label: 阅读-主旨大意

questions.group_passage:
Joining a school club is a great way to make friends and learn new skills. Here are some tips for choosing the right club.

(17)__________ Think about what you enjoy doing. If you like singing, join the music club. If you enjoy sports, try the basketball team.

(18)__________ Don't choose a club just because your friends are in it. Make sure you really like the activity yourself.

(19)__________ Some clubs meet every day, while others only meet once a week. Choose one that fits your schedule.

(20)__________ Remember, the most important thing is to have fun and learn something new.
options: A. However, make sure you have time for your homework.
C. In addition, check the meeting time.
D. On the other hand, don't just follow your friends.
E. Finally, enjoy your time in the club.
questions.explanation: 本题考查段落衔接与逻辑关系。根据下文"Think about what you enjoy doing"（考虑你喜欢做什么）可知，本段讲的是"首先，考虑你的兴趣"。First与下文形成顺序关系，consider your interests与enjoy doing对应。故选B。
questions.label: 短文填空

questions.group_passage:
Joining a school club is a great way to make friends and learn new skills. Here are some tips for choosing the right club.

(17)__________ Think about what you enjoy doing. If you like singing, join the music club. If you enjoy sports, try the basketball team.

(18)__________ Don't choose a club just because your friends are in it. Make sure you really like the activity yourself.

(19)__________ Some clubs meet every day, while others only meet once a week. Choose one that fits your schedule.

(20)__________ Remember, the most important thing is to have fun and learn something new.
options: A. However, make sure you have time for your homework.
C. In addition, check the meeting time.
D. On the other hand, don't just follow your friends.
E. Finally, enjoy your time in the club.
questions.explanation: 本题考查段落衔接与逻辑关系。根据下文"Don't choose a club just because your friends are in it"（不要因为朋友参加就选那个社团）可知，本段讲的是"另一方面，不要只是跟随朋友"。On the other hand表示另一方面，引出相反或补充的建议，don't follow your friends与下文对应。故选D。
questions.label: 短文填空

questions.group_passage:
Joining a school club is a great way to make friends and learn new skills. Here are some tips for choosing the right club.

(17)__________ Think about what you enjoy doing. If you like singing, join the music club. If you enjoy sports, try the basketball team.

(18)__________ Don't choose a club just because your friends are in it. Make sure you really like the activity yourself.

(19)__________ Some clubs meet every day, while others only meet once a week. Choose one that fits your schedule.

(20)__________ Remember, the most important thing is to have fun and learn something new.
options: A. However, make sure you have time for your homework.
C. In addition, check the meeting time.
D. On the other hand, don't just follow your friends.
E. Finally, enjoy your time in the club.
questions.explanation: 本题考查段落衔接与逻辑关系。根据下文"Some clubs meet every day, while others only meet once a week"（有些社团每天见面，有些一周一次）可知，本段讲的是"此外，检查会议时间"。In addition表示补充，check the meeting time与meet every day/once a week对应。故选C。
questions.label: 短文填空

questions.group_passage:
Joining a school club is a great way to make friends and learn new skills. Here are some tips for choosing the right club.

(17)__________ Think about what you enjoy doing. If you like singing, join the music club. If you enjoy sports, try the basketball team.

(18)__________ Don't choose a club just because your friends are in it. Make sure you really like the activity yourself.

(19)__________ Some clubs meet every day, while others only meet once a week. Choose one that fits your schedule.

(20)__________ Remember, the most important thing is to have fun and learn something new.
options: A. However, make sure you have time for your homework.
C. In addition, check the meeting time.
D. On the other hand, don't just follow your friends.
E. Finally, enjoy your time in the club.
questions.explanation: 本题考查段落衔接与逻辑关系。根据位置（最后一段）和内容"have fun"（玩得开心）可知，本段是总结性建议"最后，享受你在社团的时光"。Finally表示顺序上的最后，enjoy与have fun对应。故选E。
questions.label: 短文填空
